properties.title: The title of the API.
properties.description: While a title is not required, implementers are strongly advised to include one.

properties.title: attribution for the API
properties.description: The `attribution` should be short and intended for presentation to a user, for example, in a corner of a map. Parts of the text can be links to other resources if additional information is needed. The string can include HTML markup.
Supplies the URI to a remote resource (or resource fragment).
The type or semantics of the relation.
A hint indicating what the media type of the result of dereferencing the link should be.
A hint indicating what the language of the result of dereferencing the link should be.
Used to label the destination of a link such that it can be used as a human-readable identifier.
